name: Natasha Sult

sheet.name: Natasha Sult
sheet.background_story:
Misses the southern plains fruit, but still happy to be by her companion's side.

Survived first battle, entering final at Church and survived again.

Survived the Turlo 30, originally sent from Gunther Wolfsblood's party. Upon return she fled Gunther's camp with an Obsidian Blade. 

Yurias Madness welcome Natasha into The Furies after accepting the Blade on the condition Natasha would earn the right to wield it. 

Natasha has decided to venture to The Church and study the Lost Pilgrims while Yuria & her sister protect The Turlo.
